calendar.matters:
Court'S Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Court'S Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Continued To Mar-17-17 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 622

Ex Parte Application For Judgment For Possession Of Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Walter Parsley, Esq. for Plaintiff Anchor Realty, James Driscoll, Esq. for and with Defendant Marcus Bogue.
1:30 p.m. This matter was continued from April 15, 2016 for further hearing.
The Court states for the record that documents submitted from the parties has been reviewed by the court, and welcomes any additional oral argument from counsel.
Mr. Driscoll states his oral argument regarding his reply brief and plaintiff's motion in February.
Matter is submitted without further argument by Mr. Parsley. The Court takes the matter under submission and will issue a decision shortly to the parties.
Court stands adjourned.
Dept. 306, Judge Richard Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Peggy Tsujimoto #5229.

Ex Parte Application For Judgment For Possession Of Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-15-2016 Continued To Apr-22-16 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 306

Appearances:
Plaintiff Anchor Realty, Inc. is present. Represented by Mark Campana.
Attorney Walter Gerard Parsley for the plaintiff.
Defendants Marcus Bogue are present.
Attorney Ashley L. Shively appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Dec 14, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
